title: amethystanthus inflexus var. canescens
intro: Amethystanthus inflexus var. canescens, also known as hoary mountain mint, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Hoary mountain mint can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile and valuable addition to herbal medicine.
